sample_query:
SELECT
    job_id,
    user_email,
    query,
    statement_type,
    creation_time,
    TIMESTAMP_DIFF(end_time, start_time, SECOND) AS duration_seconds,
    total_bytes_processed,
    total_bytes_billed,
    total_slot_ms,
    cache_hit,
    referenced_tables
  FROM `alma-bq-demo-2026`.`region-us`.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.JOBS
  WHERE
    creation_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 30 DAY)
    AND job_type = 'QUERY'
    AND state = 'DONE'
    AND error_result IS NULL
  ORDER BY creation_time DESC

SELECT table_schema AS dataset, table_name, column_name, ordinal_position, data_type, is_nullable, is_partitioning_column, clustering_ordinal_position FROM `alma-bq-demo-2026`.`analytics`.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS UNION ALL SELECT table_schema AS dataset, table_name, column_name, ordinal_position, data_type, is_nullable, is_partitioning_column, clustering_ordinal_position FROM `alma-bq-demo-2026`.`raw`.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS UNION ALL SELECT table_schema AS dataset, table_name, column_name, ordinal_position, data_type, is_nullable, is_partitioning_column, clustering_ordinal_position FROM `alma-bq-demo-2026`.`staging`.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS ORDER BY dataset, table_name, ordinal_position

SELECT table_schema AS dataset, table_name, table_type, ddl FROM `alma-bq-demo-2026`.`analytics`.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES UNION ALL SELECT table_schema AS dataset, table_name, table_type, ddl FROM `alma-bq-demo-2026`.`raw`.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES UNION ALL SELECT table_schema AS dataset, table_name, table_type, ddl FROM `alma-bq-demo-2026`.`staging`.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES ORDER BY dataset, table_name
